These include a simple presets system, extensive noise processing capabilities, support for repair of progressive material, precision source matching, shutter speed simulation, etc. Originally based on TempGaussMC by Didée.

components.name: insaneAA
components.description: InsaneAA Anti-Aliasing Script (VS port). Original idea by tonik && tophf, edited and ported by DJATOM. Use this script to fix ugly upscaled anime BDs.

components.name: DeCross
components.description: DeCross is a spatio-temporal cross color (rainbow) reduction filter. DeCross must be used right after the source filter, before any field matching or deinterlacing. The luma is returned unchanged. This is a port of the DeCross Avisynth plugin, which is in turn based on the AviUtl plugin CrossColor.

components.name: TemporalSoften2
components.description: TemporalSoften filter for VapourSynth.

components.name: MotionMask
components.description: MotionMask creates a mask of moving pixels. Every output pixel will be set to the absolute difference between the current frame and the previous frame. This is a port of the mt_motion filter from pinterf's updated version of the Avisynth plugin MaskTools.

components.name: dfttest2
components.description: DFTTest re-implemetation for VapourSynth (CPU and CUDA).

components.name: DFTTest
components.description: VapourSynth port of dfttest.

components.name: DFTTest Neo
components.description: 2D/3D frequency domain denoiser using Discrete Fourier transform.

components.name: muvsfunc
components.description: Muonium's VapourSynth functions.

components.name: FFT3DGPU
components.description: Similar algorithm to FFT3DFilter, but uses graphics hardware for increased speed.

components.name: TIVTC
components.description: TIVTC is a plugin package containing 7 different filters and 3 conditional functions.

components.name: D2VSource
components.description: Source filter to open D2V index files created with DGIndex or D2V Witch.

components.name: d2vsource
components.description: Source filter to open D2V index files created with DGIndex or D2V Witch.

components.name: AVS_LibPlacebo
components.description: An AviSynth+ plugin interface to libplacebo - a reusable library for Vulkan GPU-accelerated image/video processing primitives and shaders.

components.name: libvs_placebo
components.description: A VapourSynth plugin interface to libplacebo - a reusable library for Vulkan GPU-accelerated image/video processing primitives and shaders.

components.name: libhistogram
components.description: Histogram plugin for VapourSynth. Port of the Histogram() function from Avisynth.

components.name: libimwri
components.description: Image reader and writer for VapourSynth using the ImageMagick library.

components.name: KNLMeansCL
components.description: KNLMeansCL is an optimized pixelwise OpenCL implementation of the Non-local means denoising algorithm. Every pixel is restored by the weighted average of all pixels in its search window. The level of averaging is determined by the filtering parameter h.

components.name: DSS2mod
components.description: Direct Show source filter.

components.name: Deblock
components.description: Deblocking plugin using the deblocking filter of h264.

components.name: VapourSource
components.description: VapourSource is a VapourSynth script reader for AviSynth 2.6.

components.name: TNLMeans
components.description: TNLMeans is an implementation of the NL-means denoising algorithm. Aside from the original method, TNLMeans also supports extension into 3D, a faster, block based approach, and a multiscale version.

components.name: VagueDenoiser
components.description: This is a Wavelet based Denoiser. Basically, it transforms each frame from the video input into the wavelet domain, using various wavelet filters. Then it applies some filtering to the obtained coefficients.

components.name: mvtools2
components.description: MVTools is collection of functions for estimation and compensation of objects motion in video clips. Motion compensation may be used for strong temporal denoising, advanced framerate conversions, image restoration and other tasks.

components.name: JincResize
components.description: Jinc (EWA Lanczos) resampling plugin for AviSynth 2.6/AviSynth+.

components.name: HQDeringmod
components.description: Applies deringing by using a smart smoother near edges (where ringing occurs) only.

components.name: InterFrame
components.description: A frame interpolation script that makes accurate estimations about the content of frames.

components.name: SVPFlow 1
components.description: Motion vectors search plugin  is a deeply refactored and modified version of MVTools2 Avisynth plugin.

components.name: SVPFlow 2
components.description: Motion vectors search plugin is a deeply refactored and modified version of MVTools2 Avisynth plugin.

components.name: MipSmooth
components.description: a reinvention of SmoothHiQ and Convolution3D. MipSmooth was made to enable smoothing of larger pixel areas than 3x3(x3), to remove blocks and smoothing out low-frequency noise.

components.name: TMM2
components.description: TMM builds a motion-mask for TDeint, which TDeint uses via its 'emask' parameter.

components.name: FineDehalo
components.description: Halo removal script that uses DeHalo_alpha with a few masks and optional contra-sharpening to try remove halos without removing important details (like line edges). It also includes FineDehalo2, this function tries to remove 2nd order halos. See script for extensive information.

components.name: CNR2
components.description: A fast chroma denoiser. Very effective against stationary rainbows and huge analogic chroma activity. Useful to filter VHS/TV caps.

components.name: Lazy Utilities
components.description: A collection of helper and wrapper functions meant to help script authors in handling common operations.

components.name: MultiSharpen
components.description: A small but useful Sharpening Function.

components.name: Average
components.description: A simple video filter plugin that calculates a weighted frame-by-frame average from multiple clips.

components.name: AvsResize
components.description: z.lib resizers for AviSynth+.

components.name: DPID
components.description: dpid is an algorithm that preserves visually important details in downscaled images and is especially suited for large downscaling factors.

components.name: ResizeX
components.description: ResizeX is a wrapper function for AviSynth's internal resizers and Dither_resize16 that corrects for the chroma shift caused by the internal resizers when they're used on horizontally subsampled chroma with MPEG2 placement.

components.name: Deblock_QED
components.description: Designed to provide 8x8 deblocking sensitive to the amount of blocking in the source, compared to other deblockers which apply an uniform deblocking across every frame.

components.name: nnedi3_resize16 AVSI
components.description: nnedi3_resize16 is an advanced script for image resizing and colorspace conversion.

components.name: nnedi3x AVSI
components.description: nnedi3x script function is the same as nnedi3ocl but supports RGB24 and YUY2. It also doesn't complain if you feed it with the now removed parameters from the original nnedi3.

components.name: edi_rpow2 AVSI
components.description: An improved rpow2 function for nnedi3, nnedi3ocl, eedi3, and eedi2.

components.name: SmoothD2
components.description: Deblocking filter. Rewrite of SmoothD. Faster, better detail preservation, optional chroma deblocking.

components.name: SmoothD2c
components.description: Deblocking filter. Rewrite of SmoothD. Faster, better detail preservation, optional chroma deblocking.

components.name: xNLMeans
components.description: XNLMeans is an AviSynth plugin implementation of the Non Local Means denoising algorithm.

components.name: DehaloAlpha
components.description: Reduce halo artifacts that can occur when sharpening.

components.name: MAA2Mod
components.description: Updated version of the MAA antialising script from AnimeIVTC. MAA2 uses tp7's SangNom2, which provides a nice speedup for SangNom-based antialiasing, especially when only processing the luma plane. Mod version also includes support for EEDI3 along with a few other new functions.

components.name: DAA3Mod
components.description: Motion-compensated anti-aliasing with contra-sharpening, can deal with ifade too, created because when applied daa3 to fixed scenes, it could damage some details and other issues.

components.name: eedi3_resize
components.description: eedi3 based resizing script that allows to resize to arbitrary resolutions while maintaining the correct image center and chroma location.

components.name: eedi3_resize16
components.description: eedi3 based resizing script that allows to resize to arbitrary resolutions while maintaining the correct image center and chroma location.

components.name: DeNoise Histogram
components.description: Histogram for both DenoiseMD and DenoiseMF.

components.name: FrameRateConverter DLL
components.description: Increases the frame rate with interpolation and fine artifact removal.

components.name: FrameRateConverter AVSI
components.description: Increases the frame rate with interpolation and fine artifact removal.

components.name: DeNoiseMD
components.description: A fast and accurate denoiser for a Full HD video from a H.264 camera.

components.name: DeNoiseMF
components.description: A fast and accurate denoiser for a Full HD video from a H.264 camera.

components.name: MT Expand Multi
components.description: Calls mt_expand or mt_inpand multiple times in order to grow or shrink the mask from the desired width and height.

components.name: TEMmod
components.description: TEMmod creates an edge mask using gradient vector magnitude.

components.name: AVSTP
components.description: AVSTP is a programming library for Avisynth plug-in developers. It helps supporting native multi-threading in plug-ins. It works by sharing a thread pool between multiple plug-ins, so the number of threads stays low whatever the number of instantiated plug-ins. This helps saving resources, especially when working in an Avisynth MT environment. This documentation is mostly targeted to plug-ins developpers, but contains installation instructions for Avisynth users too.

components.name: Dither AVSI
components.description: This package offers a set of tools to manipulate high-bitdepth (16 bits per plane) video clips. The most proeminent features are color banding artifact removal, dithering to 8 bits, colorspace conversions and resizing.

components.name: Dither DLL
components.description: This package offers a set of tools to manipulate high-bitdepth (16 bits per plane) video clips. The most proeminent features are color banding artifact removal, dithering to 8 bits, colorspace conversions and resizing.

components.name: DeGrainMedian
components.description: DeGrainMedian is a spatio-temporal limited median filter mainly for film grain removal, but may be used for general denoising.

components.name: pSharpen
components.description: pSharpen performs two-point sharpening to avoid overshoot.

components.name: GradFun2DBmod
components.description: An advanced debanding script based on GradFun2DB.

components.name: GradFun2DB
components.description: A simple and fast debanding filter.

components.name: AddGrainC
components.description: Generate film-like grain or other effects (like rain) by adding random noise to a video clip.

components.name: YFRC
components.description: Yushko Frame Rate convertor - doubles the frame rate with strong artifact detection and scene change detection. YFRC uses masks to reduce artifacts in areas where interpolation failed.

components.name: Deblock
components.description: Deblocking plugin using the deblocking filter of h264.

components.name: mClean
components.description: Removes noise whilst retaining as much detail as possible.

components.name: vsCube
components.description: Deblocking plugin using the deblocking filter of h264.

components.name: RgTools
components.description: RgTools is a modern rewrite of RemoveGrain, Repair, BackwardClense, Clense, ForwardClense, VerticalCleaner and TemporalRepair in a single plugin.

components.name: JPSDR
components.description: Merge of AutoYUY2, NNEDI3, HDRTools, aWarpSharpMT and ResampleMT. Included is the W7 AVX2 variant.

components.name: TDeint
components.description: TDeint is a bi-directionally, motion adaptive, sharp deinterlacer.

components.name: masktools2
components.description: MaskTools2 contain a set of filters designed to create, manipulate and use masks. Masks, in video processing, are a way to give a relative importance to each pixel. You can, for example, create a mask that selects only the green parts of the video, and then replace those parts with another video.

components.name: FluxSmooth
components.description: One of the fundamental properties of noise is that it's random. One of the fundamental properties of motion is that it's not. This is the premise behind FluxSmooth, which examines each pixel and compares it to the corresponding pixel in the previous and last frame. Smoothing occurs if both the previous frame's value and the next frame's value are greater, or if both are less, than the value in the current frame.

components.name: yadifmod2
components.description: Yet Another Deinterlacing Filter mod for Avisynth2.6/Avisynth+.

components.name: LibDedot
components.description: Temporal rainbow and dotcrawl filter.

components.name: Yadifmod
components.description: Modified version of Fizick's avisynth filter port of yadif from mplayer. This version doesn't internally generate spatial predictions, but takes them from an external clip.

components.name: FixTelecinedFades
components.description: InsaneAA Anti-Aliasing Script.

components.name: vcm
components.description: vcm plugin for VapourSynth.

components.name: vcmod
components.description: vcmod plugin for VapourSynth.

components.name: vcmove
components.description: vcmove plugin for VapourSynth.

components.name: vcfreq
components.description: vcvcfreq plugin for VapourSynth.

components.name: nnedi3
components.description: nnedi3 is an intra-field only deinterlacer. It takes in a frame, throws away one field, and then interpolates the missing pixels using only information from the kept field.

components.name: FFT3DFilter
components.description: FFT3DFilter uses Fast Fourier Transform method for image processing in frequency domain.

components.name: mvtools
components.description: MVTools is a set of filters for motion estimation and compensation.

components.name: mvtools-sf
components.description: MVTools is a set of filters for motion estimation and compensation.

components.name: TemporalMedian
components.description: TemporalMedian is a temporal denoising filter. It replaces every pixel with the median of its temporal neighbourhood.

components.name: resamplehq
components.description: TemporalMedian is a temporal denoising filter. It replaces every pixel with the median of its temporal neighbourhood.

components.name: ASTDR
components.description: ASTDR is a derainbow function for VapourSynth. ASTDRmc performs motion compensation before calling ASTDR. This is a port of the Avisynth function of the same name, version 1.74.

components.name: mcdegrainsharp
components.description: TemporalMedian is a temporal denoising filter. It replaces every pixel with the median of its temporal neighbourhood.

components.name: G41Fun
components.description: The replaced script for hnwvsfunc with re-written functions.

components.name: fvsfunc
components.description: Small collection of VapourSynth functions.

components.name: mvmulti
components.description: MVTools is a set of filters for motion estimation and compensation.

components.name: Sangnom
components.description: SangNom is a single field deinterlacer using edge-directed interpolation but nowadays it's mainly used in anti-aliasing scripts.

components.name: CAS
components.description: Contrast Adaptive Sharpening.

components.name: nnedi3_rpow2
components.description: nnedi3_rpow2 ported from Avisynth for VapourSynth.

components.name: znedi3
components.description: znedi3 is a CPU-optimized version of nnedi.

components.name: nnedi3cl
components.description: nnedi3 is an intra-field only deinterlacer. It takes a frame, throws away one field, and then interpolates the missing pixels using only information from the remaining field. It is also good for enlarging images by powers of two.

components.name: EEDI3m
components.description: EEDI3 works by finding the best non-decreasing (non-crossing) warping between two lines by minimizing a cost functional.

components.name: EEDI2
components.description: EEDI2 works by finding the best non-decreasing (non-crossing) warping between two lines by minimizing a cost functional.

components.name: W3FDIF
components.description: Weston 3 Field Deinterlacing Filter. Ported from FFmpeg's libavfilter.

components.name: MiniDeen
components.description: MiniDeen is a spatial denoising filter which replaces every pixel with the average of its neighbourhood.

components.name: IT
components.description: VapourSynth Plugin - Inverse Telecine (YV12 Only, IT-0051 base, IT_YV12-0103 base).

components.name: TDeintMod
components.description: TDeintMod is a combination of TDeint and TMM, which are both ported from tritical's AviSynth plugin.

components.name: adjust
components.description: very basic port of the built-in Avisynth filter Tweak.

components.name: Oyster
components.description: Oyster is an experimental implement of the Blocking Matching concept, designed specifically for compression artifacts removal.

components.name: Plum
components.description: Plum is a sharpening/blind deconvolution suite with certain advanced features like Non-Local error, Block Matching, etc..

components.name: Vine
components.description: Plum is a sharpening/blind deconvolution suite with certain advanced features like Non-Local error, Block Matching, etc..

components.name: TCanny
components.description: Builds an edge map using canny edge detection.

components.name: vsTAAmbk
components.description: A ported AA-script from Avisynth.

components.name: mvsfunc
components.description: mawen1250's VapourSynth functions.

components.name: SubText
components.description: Subtitle plugin for VapourSynth based on libass.

components.name: Bwdif
components.description: Motion adaptive deinterlacing based on yadif with the use of w3fdif and cubic interpolation algorithms.

components.name: FluxSmooth
components.description: FluxSmooth is a filter for smoothing of fluctuations.

components.name: CNR2
components.description: Cnr2 is a temporal denoiser designed to denoise only the chroma.

components.name: CTMF
components.description: Constant Time Median Filtering.

components.name: msmoosh
components.description: MSmooth is a spatial smoother that doesn't touch edges.

components.name: SVPFlow 1
components.description: Motion vectors search plugin  is a deeply refactored and modified version of MVTools2 Avisynth plugin.

components.name: SVPFlow 2
components.description: Motion vectors search plugin is a deeply refactored and modified version of MVTools2 Avisynth plugin.

components.name: Dither
components.description: VapourSynth port of DitherTools.

components.name: DeblockPP7
components.description: VapourSynth port of pp7 from MPlayer.

components.name: HQDN3D
components.description: Avisynth port of hqdn3d from avisynth/mplayer.

components.name: VagueDenoiser
components.description: VapourSynth port of VagueDenoiser.

components.name: TimeCube
components.description: Allows Usage of 3DLuts.

components.name: DegrainMedian
components.description: VapourSynth port of DegrainMedian.

components.name: psharpen
components.description: VapourSynth port of pSharpen.

components.name: AWarpSharp2
components.description: VapourSynth port of AWarpSharp2.

components.name: fmtconv
components.description: Fmtconv is a format-conversion plug-in for the Vapoursynth video processing engine. It does resizing, bitdepth conversion with dithering and colorspace conversion.

components.name: finesharp
components.description: Port of Didée's FineSharp script to VapourSynth.

components.name: FineSharp
components.description: Small and relatively fast realtime-sharpening function, for 1080p, or after scaling 720p -> 1080p during playback (to make 720p look more like being 1080p). It's a generic sharpener. Only for good quality sources!

components.name: CropResize
components.description: Advanced crop and resize AviSynth script.

components.name: CAS
components.description: Contrast Adaptive Sharpening. This is a port of the VapourSynth plugin CAS.

components.name: TTempSmooth
components.description: TTempSmooth is a motion adaptive (it only works on stationary parts of the picture), temporal smoothing filter. TTempSmoothF is a faster (50-75%) version of TTempSmooth that doesn't take the mdiff/mdiffC parameters (it is equivalent to running TTempSmooth with mdiff/mdiffC set equal to or greater then LThresh-1/CThresh-1).

components.name: TTempSmooth
components.description: VapourSynth port of TTempSmooth.

components.name: vsTTempSmooth
components.description: TTempSmooth is a motion adaptive (it only works on stationary parts of the picture), temporal smoothing filter. This is a port of the VapourSynth plugin TTempSmooth.

components.name: CASm
components.description: An improved sharpening script based on CAS and aWarpSharp2. Originally composed by Atak_Snajpera for RipBot264, and renamed/modded by JKyle for StaxRip.

components.name: AddGrain
components.description: AddGrain generates film like grain or other effects (like rain) by adding random noise to a video clip. This noise may optionally be horizontally or vertically correlated to cause streaking. VapourSynth port of AddGrainC.

components.name: Bwdif
components.description: Motion adaptive deinterlacing based on yadif with the use of w3fdif and cubic interpolation algorithms. This is a port of the VapourSynth plugin Bwdif, which is again a port of FFmpeg's libavfilter bwdif.

components.name: FillBorders
components.description: This is a simple filter that fills the borders of a clip, without changing the clip's dimensions.

components.name: FillBorders
components.description: A simple filter that fills the borders of a clip, without changing the clip's dimensions. This is a port of the VapourSynth plugin FillBorders.

components.name: DeRainbow
components.description: A simple script to reduce rainbows.

components.name: DotKill
components.description: A spatio-temporal dotcrawl and rainbow remover for AviSynth/AviSynth+. This is a port of the VapourSynth plugin DotKill.

components.name: DotKill
components.description: A spatio-temporal dotcrawl and rainbow remover for VapourSynth.

components.name: vsCnr2
components.description: vsCnr2 is a temporal denoiser designed to denoise only the chroma, suited for stationary rainbows or noisy analog captures. This is a port of the VapourSynth plugin Cnr2.

components.name: TimecodeFPS
components.description: An AviSynth plugin to convert VFR(variable frame rate) to CFR(constant frame rate) using MKV timecodes. This filter works only with FFmpegSource2 plugin filters, that is, FFMS2 and FFVideoSource source filters.

components.name: VfrToCfr
components.description: This plugin converts variable frame rate clips to constant frame rate by inserting null frames (exact copies of previous frames). This filter works only with FFmpegSource2 plugin filters, that is, FFMS2 and FFVideoSource source filters.

components.name: GRunT
components.description: Gavino's Run-Time for AviSynth.

components.name: Srestore
components.description: An AviSynth field-blending/frame-blending removal script function that uses conditional frame evaluation for the output calculation.

components.name: ReduceFlicker
components.description: A AviSynth 2.6/AviSynth+ plugin to reduce temporal oscillations.

components.name: VFRToCFR
components.description: Converts Variable Frame Rate (VFR) video to a Constant Frame Rate (CFR) video through the use of Matroska Version 2 Timecodes. Ported from the Avisynth plugin written by Nicholai Main.

components.name: Bifrost
components.description: A temporal derainbowing filter created by Fredrik Mellbin. The original Avisynth plugin (version 1.1) worked on the whole frame or not at all. This version works on blocks, meaning that static parts of the image can be processed even if something moves on screen.

components.name: Bifrost
components.description: This is a VapourSynth port of Bifrost, a temporal derainbowing filter created by Fredrik Mellbin. The original Avisynth plugin (version 1.1) worked on the whole frame or not at all. This version works on blocks, meaning that static parts of the image can be processed even if something moves on screen. This VapourSynth plugin will accept any 8 bit YUV formats.

components.name: ChubbyRain2
components.description: A spatio-temporal rainbow reducing script composed by Lothar based on Mug Funky's ChubbyRain. Included is a mod version by Asd-g that accepts progressive sources only.

components.name: ChubbyRain3
components.description: A spatio-temporal rainbow reducing script composed by Lothar based on Mug Funky's ChubbyRain. Included is a mod version by Asd-g that accepts progressive sources only.

components.name: DeFlicker
components.description: DeFlicker plugin can remove old film intensity flicker by temporal mean luma smoothing. Also it can correct blinding of automatic gain control after flashes. The luma stabilizing not only improves visual impression, but can help to following noise reduction.

components.name: FillDrops
components.description: An AviSynth filter to detect and replace duplicate frames with a motion-interpolation of the adjacent frames. Included is a mod by Selur.

components.name: filldrops
components.description: A filter to detect and replace duplicate frames with a motion-interpolation of the adjacent frames. This is a VapourSynth port of FillDrops by Selur and Myrsloik, modded by JKyle.

components.name: DeJump
components.description: An AviSynth filter that smooths out jumps and drops preserving the original frame rate. Composed and modded by JKyle based on John Meyer's script.

components.name: RT_Stats
components.description: StainlessS's compile-time/runtime functions for AviSynth.

components.name: ExactDedup
components.description: ExactDedup is an AviSynth filter intended to remove frames that are exact duplicates of each other, leaving only the first and (optionally) last frames of a run intact, and generates a Matroska v2 timecodes file with timing information for the ensuing stream. Due to the particulars of the AviSynth API, ExactDedup requires two passes to function efficiently. It could theoretically be designed to run with one pass, but this would result in a very long startup delay while the plugin precomputes all of the duplicate frame information and timecodes.

components.name: Santiag
components.description: Simple anti-aliasing with independent horizontal and vertical strength.

components.name: DirectX 9
components.description: DirectX 9.0c End-User Runtime.
